text:
Market today: Geopolitical tensions are heating up in the Middle East, pushing oil prices higher and creating broad market uncertainty. However, strong China export data, fueled by the AI boom, offers a positive counter-signal for your tech and chip names.

Your holdings: SOXL (-35.02%) and SPAL (-34%) are leveraged ETFs deeply in the red; their decay and volatility are amplified by margin. QQQI (-1.77%) is also flagged for a trim and is close to its stop.

Watch: Keep a close eye on Middle East developments and oil prices for broader market impact. Also, monitor the performance of your leveraged ETFs, SOXL and SPAL, given their significant drawdowns.

Bottom line: Focus on managing risk, especially on your leveraged positions, as market volatility could pick up.
plays: SOXL: Review your stop or consider trimming this leveraged position given its -35.02% loss and decay.
SPAL: Consider tightening your stop or trimming this new, leveraged position, currently down -34%.
AMZN: China's AI boom supports tech; scanner shows AMZN long setup: entry 247.06-246.82, stop 246.45.
